description:
YouTube videolarini MP3, MP4 va WAV formatlarida yuklab oling. Yuklab olishni davom ettirish, kliplarni kesish, skrinshotlar, qisqa URL nusxalash va aqlli yuklab olish menejeri - NVDA foydalanuvchilari uchun tez va qulay.
Videoni darhol olish mumkin bo'lsa, video sahifasini ochishga vaqt sarflashning nima keragi bor? Bizning so'nggi yangilanishimiz inqilobiy Focus and Fetch funksiyasini taqdim etadi. Shunchaki kursorni istalgan video havolasiga qarating va yuklab olishni darhol boshlang - sahifalar yuklanishini kutishga hojat yo'q.
Yangiliklar:
Darhol yuklab olish rejimini yoqish/o'chirish
Yuklab olishlar ro'yxati menejeri
Sevimli kanal
YouTube'dan qidirish
Tezkor tugmalar:
- NVDA+Y
Bir marta bosish: MP3 yuklab olish
Ikki marta bosish: MP4 yuklab olish
Uch marta bosish: WAV yuklab olish
- CTRL+Shift+Y
Bir marta bosish: Kontekst menyusini ochish
Ikki marta bosish: Maqsadli papkani ochish
Uch marta bosish: Videoni qidirish
NVDA+CTRL+Y: Darhol yuklab olish rejimini yoqish/o'chirish
NVDA+Shift+Y: Pleylist rejimini yoqish/o'chirish
- ALT+Windows+Y: MP3 sifatini o'zgartirish
changelog: Fix Playlist Mode Snapshot and Trim logic, improve backend stability.
